data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges BioVie Inc. shareholders to act swiftly, investigating possible breaches by officers and directors. Contact them to discuss your rights. NY, Dec. 24, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Investors are advised to get in touch with the company promptly as time might be running out to assert their rights. On December 24, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, is looking into potential breaches by specific officers and directors of BioVie Inc. (NASDAQ: BIVI). Shareholders are urged to act swiftly in this matter.

data.title: LoKation Real Estate awarded 2025 Inman AI Award for AI innovation in real estate operations and agent growth.
data.description: In Pompano Beach, Florida on December 24, 2025, LoKation Real Estate was announced as the recipient of the prestigious 2025 Inman AI Award. This award acknowledges the brokerage's outstanding use of artificial intelligence in enhancing real estate operations, fostering agent development, and facilitating strategic business choices.

data.title: Mondelēz Global LLC recalls 2 SKUs of CHIPS AHOY! Baked Bites Brookie in the US due to small corn starch clumps posing choking risk.
data.description: In East Hanover, N.J., on December 24, 2025, Mondelēz Global LLC issued a voluntary recall in the United States for CHIPS AHOY! Baked Bites Brookie. The recall was initiated due to an error in the mixing process that led to the presence of small corn starch clumps in the product. The recall was prompted by concerns that the small starch clumps could pose a choking hazard, especially for vulnerable populations like young children and the elderly.

data.description: Searching for the top games of the year for enjoyable moments with friends and family? Our recommendations include Donkey Kong Bananza and Borderlands 4 for fantastic co-op experiences.

data.title: Palantir stocks outperform in 2025, beats earnings by 25% in Nov with EPS of 21 cents and $1.18 billion revenue - on Nice list for 2026.
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc (NASDAQ: PLTR) has had a remarkable year in 2025, outperforming expectations with strong earnings results consistently. As a result, the company is well-positioned for a positive outlook in 2026. The stock of Palantir Technologies is on an upward trajectory, showing signs of further growth. In November alone, the Denver-based AI and data analytics firm exceeded market forecasts by an impressive 25%, reporting earnings per share (EPS) of 21 cents compared to the anticipated 17 cents. Revenue for the period reached $1.18 billion, indicating a significant 62.8% surge from the previous year. Additionally, Palantir raised its guidance, indicating confidence in its future performance. This story and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ethereum price faces pressure ahead of $6B options expiry; investors seek downside protection, signaling caution.
data.description: Investors are showing a sense of caution as the year-end $6 billion options expiry nears in the world of Ethereum. Data on ETH options indicates that investors are increasingly seeking downside protection, reflecting a growing concern about potential risks in the market.

data.title: Global fitness apps market to reach $25.8 billion by 2030 from $12.1 billion in 2024, with 13.5% CAGR, due to subscription-based apps and at-home workouts.
data.description: A recent report on fitness apps indicates significant growth in the global market. Predictions suggest the market will increase from US$12.1 billion in 2024 to US$25.8 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate of 13.5% during this period. This analysis covers various aspects such as market dynamics, technological developments, consumer choices, and competition landscape. These insights are valuable for making informed business decisions in this industry.

data.title: $8.9 billion FSO & VLC/Li-Fi market is rapidly advancing with innovative optical wireless communication solutions.
data.description: A report titled "FSO & VLC/Li-Fi Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The FSO & VLC/Li-Fi Market is experiencing significant growth, reshaping high-capacity, secure data connectivity in various sectors with inventive optical wireless communication solutions. data.title: Dow Jones & S&P 500 reach record highs before Christmas; Palantir, Tesla, Google, & Nvidia see gains.
data.description: The Dow Jones achieved a new record high at the close, while the S&P 500 reached an all-time high intraday as the Christmas holiday approached. Stocks like Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia are showing strong buying potential. The post highlights the milestone reached by the Dow Jones and S&P 500 before the Christmas holiday, reflecting positive market sentiment.

data.title: Dow & S&P rise in shortened trading session post FDA news. AI stock jumps as S&P eyes record amid Santa rally hopes.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 saw an increase in Wednesday's abbreviated trading session. A pharmaceutical company experienced a significant surge following positive news from the FDA. As the S&P is nearing a potential record high, there are hopes for a Santa Claus rally. Additionally, an artificial intelligence stock made a notable leap.

data.title: Tech firm Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. wraps up IPO, raising $200M.
data.description: A recent study has found that approximately 25% of adults in the country are experiencing symptoms of anxiety and depression, with 12% reporting severe levels of distress. The study surveyed over 10,000 individuals across various age groups and regions. It also revealed that 30% of young adults between 18-24 years old are facing mental health issues. The research highlights the growing concern of mental health challenges in the population, indicating a need for increased support and resources to address this issue.

data.title: Social Commerce Partners Corp closed $100M IPO with 10M units at $10 each. Each unit has 1 Class A share and 0.5 warrant. Listed on Nasdaq as SCPQU. After separation, shares and warrants to trade as SCPQ and SCPQW.
data.description: Plano, Texas - On December 24, 2025, Social Commerce Partners Corporation completed its initial public offering, raising $100,000,000 by offering 10,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and half of a redeemable warrant. The full warrant allows holders to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. The company's units now trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under "SCPQU". Following separation, whole warrants can be traded separately. The Class A ordinary shares and warrants are anticipated to trade as "SCPQ" and "SCPQW" respectively on Nasdaq.
